## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## User-Facing Impact

- what users will notice
- screenshots or screen recordings if the UI changed

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run selftest` (if local OpenClaw environment was available)
- [ ] relevant docs updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes

## Risks And Follow-Up

- rollout notes
- known risks
- follow-up work
